title: aristida refracta
intro: Aristida refracta, also known as black grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Aristida refracta include treating urinary tract infections, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. Aristida refracta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported healing properties.
